zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise FitzGeoffrey於1207年出生在英國波克夏斯特亞特利時，她的父親Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex45歲，母親Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex47歲。她於大約1225年與Reginald II de Mohun在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年8月8日在英國英格蘭艾可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise FitzGeoffrey于1207年出生在英国波克夏斯特亞特利时，她的父亲Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex45岁，母亲Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex47岁。她于大约1225年与Reginald II de Mohun在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年8月8日在英国英格兰艾可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise FitzGeoffrey was born in 1207, in Streatley, Berkshire, England, her father, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, was 45 and her mother, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, was 47. She married Reginald II de Mohun about 1225, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 8 August 1247, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise FitzGeoffrey est née en 1207, à Streatley, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald II de Mohun environ 1225, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1247, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise FitzGeoffrey 1207 in Streatley, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex 45 und ihre Mutter Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex 47. Sie hat um 1225 in Norfolk, England Reginald II de Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. August 1247 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Reginald II de Mohun circa 1225, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1247, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise FitzGeoffreyが1207年にイギリスバークシュアイアストレアトリーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essexは45歳，母Aveline de Clare Countess of Essexは47歳であった。約1225年にイギリスノーフォルクでReginald II de Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年8月8日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで40歳で死去した。

ko.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지 토브리지 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Hawise FitzGeoffrey(이)가 1207년 영국 버크실르 스트리틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1225년 영국 노르폴크에서 Reginald II de Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise FitzGeoffrey nasceu em 1207, em Streatley, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald II de Mohun aproximadamente 1225, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1247, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: тонбридж кастл, тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise FitzGeoffrey родилась в 1207 г. в местности стритли, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald II de Mohun около 1225 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 августа 1247 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise FitzGeoffrey nació en 1207, en Streatley, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Reginald II de Mohun aproximadamente 1225, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1247, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
